name: Herb Stuffing Bake
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Can mushroom stems and pieces, drained
14 oz Pkg. unseasoned whole wheat and white dry bread cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Use a combination of whole wheat and white bread for added flavor, texture, and fiber.
2. Heat oven to 325°F.
3. Melt margarine in a large saucepan over medium heat.
4. Add celery and onion; cook and stir until tender.
5. Stir in thyme, sage, pepper, and mushrooms.
6. Add bread cubes; mix well.
7. Gradually pour water and broth over bread mixture; toss to moisten evenly.
8. Spoon stuffing mixture into an ungreased 2-quart casserole.
9. Cover.
10. Bake at 325°F for 45 to 50 minutes or until thoroughly heated. Serves 3/4 cup.
One and one-half teaspoons poultry seasoning can be substituted for the thyme and sage.
